reviews.review_text: The car seems nice and drives well, just as the seller said, but I later learned about a minor dent and a repair that weren't mentioned upfront.
revealed_facts: Quarter-sized dent with minor paint crack on rear passenger door from shopping cart impact, partially hidden by door handle shadow in photos
Single Carfax flag for minor fender bender in 2021, repaired at non-certified body shop with aftermarket bumper cover

reviews.review_text: The seller actively misrepresented the car's condition, mileage, and history. Several major mechanical and body issues were revealed after purchase that were not disclosed and contradicted their statements.
revealed_facts: Odometer rolled back from 127,000 miles; previous owner was a rideshare driver who put on excessive highway miles before selling to auction
MT-82 manual transmission exhibits grinding when engaging 2nd and 3rd gears; synchros are worn and will require rebuild within 10,000 miles
Rear passenger side quarter panel has been replaced after collision; paint match is slightly off and body lines don't align perfectly with trunk lid
Coyote V8 has developed a ticking noise from the right bank valve train; likely needs cam phaser replacement which is a known issue on high-mileage examples

reviews.review_text: The seller actively concealed major mechanical issues, including transmission and engine problems, misrepresented the car's history with an odometer rollback, and hid significant frame corrosion, leading to an extremely unfair price.
revealed_facts: Odometer was rolled back from 187,000 to 142,000 miles; prior auction records confirm actual mileage
8-speed automatic exhibits shudder between 35-50 mph indicating torque converter lockup clutch failure; repair typically $2,800-$3,500
Active Fuel Management lifters ticking on cold start with intermittent misfire codes on cylinders 1 and 7; lifter/cam replacement needed
Rear frame crossmember shows significant corrosion with 30% material loss; will fail inspection in rust-belt states

reviews.review_text: A very friendly seller who made the buying process easy. The car was presented as reliable and safe, which is exactly what I was looking for.
revealed_facts: Driver seat bolster has minor wear and slight fabric pilling from entry/exit

reviews.review_text: The car had an undisclosed dent and was overdue for an oil change, despite claims of pristine condition and impeccable care.
revealed_facts: Quarter-panel dent on rear passenger side approximately 3 inches in diameter, touched up but visible under direct light
Oil change overdue by 4,200 miles; last documented service at 68,500 miles

reviews.review_text: The car seems nice and runs well, just as they said. There was a tiny coffee stain on the back seat I didn't know about, but it's not a big deal.
revealed_facts: Small coffee stain on rear seat fabric, approximately 2 inches in diameter, mostly hidden by seat crease

reviews.review_text: The seller did not disclose a significant collision history or several mechanical and interior defects, leading to a much higher price than the car was worth.
revealed_facts: Moderate front-end collision in 2019 with $7,200 in repairs through insurance; airbags did not deploy but bumper, hood, and radiator support were replaced
Valve cover gasket seeping oil onto exhaust manifold, causing occasional burning smell after spirited driving; repair quoted at $850
Driver seat bolster leather cracked and foam showing through; passenger side beginning to crack as well
